context7.description: Live documentation lookup (use with /docs skill + documentation-lookup). No auth required.

exa.description: Web search / research / data ingestion via Exa. Disable via ECC_DISABLED_MCPS=exa when EXA_API_KEY is absent.

memory.description: Persistent memory across sessions (local sqlite at .cursor/memory.sqlite).

playwright.description: Browser automation for e2e / harness tests. No auth required.

supabase.description: Supabase DB operations. Disable via ECC_DISABLED_MCPS=supabase when SUPABASE_URL is absent.

_ecc_notes.disabling: Set ECC_DISABLED_MCPS=server1,server2 in the shell before Cursor launch; the ECC session hook reads it and strips disabled servers at startup. See tools/ai/README.md.
_ecc_notes.context_warning: Keep <=10 MCP servers enabled (ECC recommendation). Graphify consultation lives in .cursor/rules/graphify.mdc, not in this MCP list - graphify.exe reads graph.json directly from the filesystem.
_ecc_notes.agentshield_note: AgentShield is enforced via .github/workflows/agentshield.yml and .cursor/hooks/before-submit-prompt.js, not via a separate MCP server at v1.10.0. See ADR-0120.
